top_signals.title: La Caisse Arm Buys Database Firm ISC in $872 Million Deal
top_signals.summary: The infrastructure arm of Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec will take Canadian database company Information Services Corp. private in a deal worth C$1.2 billion ($872 million).
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: La Caisse Arm Buys Database Firm ISC in $872 Million Deal
alerts.summary: The infrastructure arm of Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec will take Canadian database company Information Services Corp. private in a deal worth C$1.2 billion ($872 million).
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
